TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Jigme_Khesar_Namgyel_Wangchuck, title = Jigme_Khesar_Namgyel_Wangchuck, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jigme_Khesar_Namgyel_Wangchuck} }

S.FORM: = Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck = Mntucing hngkawas 1980 idas 2 jiyax 21 ka Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bhutan ta sayang o kiya ka Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, pnaah hngkawas 2006 idas 12 jiyax 14 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ɟigmə kħəsaɾ namgjəl waŋʦħuʦk = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɟigmə kħəsaɾ namgjəl waŋʦħuʦk ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan bħutan ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟigmə kħəsaɾ namgjəl waŋʦħuʦk, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
S.FORM: = Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck = Mntucing hngkawas 1980 idas 2 jiyax 21 ka Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bhutan ta sayang o kiya ka Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, pnaah hngkawas 2006 idas 12 jiyax 14 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ɟigmə kħəsaɾ namgjəl waŋʦħuʦk = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɟigmə kħəsaɾ namgjəl waŋʦħuʦk ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan bħutan ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟigmə kħəsaɾ namgjəl waŋʦħuʦk, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
